G_Ins_lg_and_S_cent_ins.notes: Mid-insula processes visceral signals; anterior insula (short gyri) codes subjective emotional states.

G_and_S_cingul-Ant.notes: Dorsal ACC monitors cognitive conflict; ventral ACC (subgenual) regulates emotion.

G_and_S_cingul-Mid-Ant.notes: Bridging region between cognitive and affective cingulate zones.

G_and_S_cingul-Mid-Post.notes: Interfaces with motor and parietal regions; less directly affective than anterior cingulate.

G_and_S_frontomargin.notes: Anterior-most prefrontal cortex; implicated in complex social and moral judgments.

G_and_S_occipital_inf.notes: Low-level visual processing; modest affect relevance via emotional image processing.

G_and_S_paracentral.notes: Medial motor/sensory region; low direct emotion relevance.

G_and_S_subcentral.functional_role: subcentral gyrus (secondary somatosensory cortex, parietal operculum)
G_and_S_subcentral.notes: SII processes tactile and pain signals; contributes to somatic aspects of emotion.

G_and_S_transv_frontopol.notes: Frontopolar cortex; involved in complex social and temporal reasoning.

G_cingul-Post-dorsal.notes: Dorsal PCC supports attention and spatial cognition within the default mode.

G_cingul-Post-ventral.notes: Core DMN hub; deactivates during focused tasks; active during emotional self-reflection.

G_cuneus.notes: Early visual cortex; very low direct emotion relevance.

G_front_inf-Opercular.notes: Broca's area; important for language and understanding goal-directed actions.

G_front_inf-Orbital.notes: Supports semantic and pragmatic language; processes emotional valence in words.

G_front_inf-Triangul.notes: Key Broca region for language; activates during semantic and syntactic processing.

G_front_middle.notes: DLPFC is critical for top-down emotion regulation; suppresses amygdala responses.

G_front_sup.notes: Medial superior frontal; important for mentalizing and social-emotional cognition.

G_insular_short.notes: Anterior insula is among the most affect-relevant cortical regions; tracks subjective emotional states and bodily feelings. Strong amygdala coupling (Seeley 2007).

G_oc-temp_lat-fusifor.notes: FFA (fusiform face area) in right hemisphere; especially responsive to emotional faces.

G_oc-temp_med-Lingual.notes: Processes visual words and colors; modest role in emotional scene imagery.

G_oc-temp_med-Parahip.notes: Parahippocampal cortex encodes spatial and contextual memory; important for contextual fear and emotional episodic memory.

G_occipital_middle.notes: Motion and object visual processing; low direct emotion relevance.

G_occipital_sup.notes: Dorsal 'where' stream; low direct emotion relevance.

G_orbital.notes: Lateral OFC responds to punishment; central OFC to reward. Strong coupling with amygdala and ventral striatum (Hare 2009).

G_pariet_inf-Angular.notes: Angular gyrus / TPJ is a key DMN and social cognition node; integrates semantic and social information.

G_pariet_inf-Supramar.notes: Right SMG contributes to emotional empathy and phonological working memory.

G_parietal_sup.notes: Dorsal attention network; low direct emotion relevance.

G_postcentral.notes: SI processes the somatosensory dimension of pain, but not the affective dimension.

G_precentral.notes: Primary motor cortex; minimal direct emotion relevance outside embodied simulation.

G_precuneus.notes: Key DMN hub; active during vivid mental imagery and self-related emotional memories.

G_rectus.notes: Medial most OFC; codes subjective reward value and is strongly linked to ventral striatum.

G_subcallosal.notes: Primary target of deep-brain stimulation for treatment-resistant depression (Mayberg 2005). Hub for negative affect and mood regulation. Directly wired to hypothalamus and amygdala.

G_temp_sup-G_T_transv.notes: Primary auditory cortex; will always activate for any audio stimulus. Use contrast subtraction to remove TTS baseline.

G_temp_sup-G_temp_transv_and_interm_S.notes: Primary auditory region; auditory-input confound -- interpret in context of contrast.

G_temp_sup-Lateral.functional_role: lateral superior temporal gyrus / posterior STS
G_temp_sup-Lateral.notes: Posterior STS processes the social and emotional qualities of voice; tracks emotional prosody (Belin 2000).

G_temp_sup-Plan_polar.notes: Auditory belt cortex; modest emotion relevance via voice emotion processing.

G_temp_sup-Plan_tempo.notes: Planum temporale is strongly left-lateralized for language; also tracks emotional prosody.

G_temporal_inf.notes: High-level visual and semantic processing; moderate affect relevance via emotional concept knowledge.

G_temporal_middle.notes: MTG is a key semantic hub; carries emotional semantic content (words for emotions, concepts).

Lat_Fis-ant-Horizont.functional_role: anterior horizontal ramus of lateral sulcus
Lat_Fis-ant-Horizont.notes: Anatomical sulcal region adjacent to IFG; minimal independent function.

Lat_Fis-ant-Vertical.functional_role: anterior vertical ramus of lateral sulcus
Lat_Fis-ant-Vertical.notes: Anatomical sulcal region adjacent to IFG.

Lat_Fis-post.notes: Region surrounding posterior Sylvian fissure; auditory and language processing.

Medial_wall.notes: Medial surface label including SMA and pre-SMA; involved in voluntary action initiation.

Pole_occipital.notes: Primary visual cortex, foveal representation; very low emotion relevance.

Pole_temporal.notes: Temporal pole is a major semantic-emotional hub; codes knowledge about people, emotional situations, and social concepts (Olson 2007). Strongly co-activates with amygdala in emotional/social processing.

S_calcarine.notes: V1 calcarine; minimal direct emotion relevance.

S_central.notes: Central sulcus boundary; minimal direct emotion relevance.

S_cingul-Marginalis.notes: Posterior cingulate/motor region boundary; limited direct emotional function.

S_circular_insula_ant.notes: Bordering anterior insula; processes interoceptive and affective signals. Part of the salience network.

S_circular_insula_inf.notes: Inferior insula boundary; processes gustatory and reward signals.

S_circular_insula_sup.notes: Bordering posterior insula; primarily auditory and vestibular function.

S_collat_transv_ant.notes: Parahippocampal place area (PPA); encodes spatial context and contributes to contextual fear conditioning.

S_collat_transv_post.notes: Posterior visual temporal; low direct emotion relevance.

S_front_inf.notes: Inferior frontal; supports language and cognitive control including emotion regulation.

S_front_middle.notes: DLPFC sulcus; important for emotion regulation via top-down control of limbic activity.

S_front_sup.functional_role: superior frontal sulcus (dorsal premotor / DLPFC border)
S_front_sup.notes: Dorsal prefrontal sulcus; moderate role in cognitive regulation of emotion.

S_intrapariet_and_P_trans.notes: IPS is central to spatial attention and numerical cognition; low direct emotion relevance.

S_oc-temp_lat.notes: Visual temporal sulcus; moderate affect relevance via emotional face processing.

S_oc-temp_med_and_Lingual.notes: Lingual region; visual word form and color; low direct emotion relevance.

S_oc_middle_and_Lunatus.functional_role: middle occipital sulcus and lunate sulcus
S_oc_middle_and_Lunatus.notes: Transition occipital region; minimal emotion relevance.

S_occipital_ant.notes: Ventral visual; minimal direct emotion relevance.

S_orbital-H_Shaped.notes: OFC H-shaped sulci code reward and punishment; central to affective decision-making.

S_orbital_lateral.notes: Lateral OFC codes negative outcomes and punishment; important for adaptive emotional regulation.

S_orbital_med-olfact.notes: Medial OFC / vmPFC is a critical emotion-value region; strongly coupled with amygdala (Hare 2009) and ventral striatum. Tracks subjective emotional value.

S_parieto_occipital.notes: Parieto-occipital transition; dorsal visual and attentional; low emotion relevance.

S_pericallosal.notes: Cingulate sulcus region spanning ACC and mid-cingulate; involved in emotional attention and motivation.

S_postcentral.notes: Somatosensory association; modest role via body-state signals in emotion.

S_precentral-inf-part.notes: Premotor / speech motor; minimal direct emotion relevance.

S_precentral-sup-part.notes: Dorsal premotor; minimal direct emotion relevance.

S_suborbital.notes: Near sgACC and medial OFC; processes mood and emotional valence; overlaps reward circuitry.

S_subparietal.notes: Posterior parietal DMN region; active during self-referential and social cognition.

S_temporal_inf.notes: High-level visual semantics; moderate affect relevance via emotional concept retrieval.

S_temporal_sup.notes: STS is one of the most important cortical regions for social and emotional processing; tracks emotional prosody, social perception, and mentalizing (Allison 2000, Frith 2007).

S_temporal_transverse.notes: Secondary auditory cortex; auditory belt region; will be elevated for any audio input -- interpret in context of contrast.
